questions.q: In which year was the actress Shabana Azmi born?
questions.explanation: Shabana Azmi was born on 18 September 1950.

questions.q: Which 1974 Shyam Benegal film marked Shabana Azmi's feature film debut?
questions.explanation: Shabana Azmi made her debut in Shyam Benegal's Ankur (1974).

questions.q: Shabana Azmi is the daughter of which celebrated Urdu poet and lyricist?
questions.explanation: Shabana Azmi is the daughter of the poet and lyricist Kaifi Azmi.

questions.q: From which premier film institute did Shabana Azmi graduate before entering films?
options: Satyajit Ray Film and Television Institute
Film and Television Institute of India (FTII)
questions.explanation: Shabana Azmi is a graduate of the Film and Television Institute of India (FTII) in Pune.

questions.q: Shabana Azmi is most closely associated with which movement in Indian cinema?
questions.explanation: Shabana Azmi is regarded as the most decorated performer associated with Parallel cinema.

questions.q: How many National Film Awards for Best Actress has Shabana Azmi won?
questions.explanation: Shabana Azmi won five National Film Awards for Best Actress, the most by any actress in that category.

questions.q: For her work in which 1982 Mahesh Bhatt film did Shabana Azmi win a National Film Award for Best Actress?
questions.explanation: Shabana Azmi won a National Film Award for Best Actress for Mahesh Bhatt's Arth (1982).

questions.q: Which Indian civilian honour was conferred on Shabana Azmi in 2012, following her earlier Padma Shri?
questions.explanation: Shabana Azmi received the Padma Shri in 1988 and the Padma Bhushan in 2012 for her contribution to the arts.

questions.q: Who directed the 1974 film Ankur in which Shabana Azmi made her screen debut?
questions.explanation: Ankur (1974) was directed by Shyam Benegal.

questions.q: Shabana Azmi is married to which noted lyricist and screenwriter?
questions.explanation: Shabana Azmi is married to lyricist and screenwriter Javed Akhtar.

questions.q: For her role in which 1984 Mrinal Sen film did Shabana Azmi win a National Film Award for Best Actress?
questions.explanation: Shabana Azmi won a National Film Award for Best Actress for playing Jamini in Mrinal Sen's Khandhar (1984).

questions.q: In Deepa Mehta's 1996 film Fire, Shabana Azmi played Radha opposite which co-star as Sita?
questions.explanation: In Fire (1996), Shabana Azmi played Radha opposite Nandita Das as Sita.

questions.q: In Aparna Sen's 2005 film 15 Park Avenue, Shabana Azmi played an elder sister caring for a schizophrenic sibling portrayed by which actress?
questions.explanation: In 15 Park Avenue (2005), Shabana Azmi played Anjali, caring for her sister Meethi, played by Konkona Sen Sharma.

questions.q: Shabana Azmi appeared in the 1988 international film Madame Sousatzka alongside which acclaimed Hollywood actress?
questions.explanation: Shabana Azmi appeared in John Schlesinger's Madame Sousatzka (1988) alongside Shirley MacLaine.

questions.q: In Roland Joffe's 1992 film City of Joy, set in Kolkata, Shabana Azmi appeared opposite which Hollywood actor?
questions.explanation: Shabana Azmi co-starred with Patrick Swayze in Roland Joffe's City of Joy (1992).

questions.q: What was the name of the wronged wife Shabana Azmi played in Mahesh Bhatt's 1982 film Arth?
questions.explanation: In Arth (1982), Shabana Azmi played Pooja, the wife of filmmaker Inder Malhotra; Smita Patil played the other woman, Kavita.

questions.q: In which Muzaffar Ali film did Shabana Azmi play a chikan-embroidery worker who supports her family amid the exploitation of Lucknow's artisans?
questions.explanation: Shabana Azmi played the title role in Muzaffar Ali's Anjuman (1986), set among the chikan embroidery workers of Lucknow.

questions.q: In which year was Ankur, the debut film for which Shabana Azmi won a National Film Award for Best Actress, released?
questions.explanation: Shabana Azmi won the National Film Award for Best Actress for Ankur, released in 1974.

questions.q: Shabana Azmi was nominated to which body of the Indian Parliament in 1997?
questions.explanation: Shabana Azmi served as a nominated member of the Rajya Sabha from 1997 to 2003.

questions.q: In the 1983 film Masoom, Shabana Azmi played the wife of a character portrayed by which actor?
questions.explanation: In Masoom (1983), Shabana Azmi played Indu opposite Naseeruddin Shah's character D.K. Malhotra.

questions.q: For her performance in which Goutam Ghose film about a landless rural couple did Shabana Azmi win a National Film Award for Best Actress?
questions.explanation: Shabana Azmi won a National Film Award for Best Actress for Goutam Ghose's Paar (1984).

questions.q: Shabana Azmi played the brothel madam Rukmini Bai in which 1983 Shyam Benegal film?
questions.explanation: Shabana Azmi played Rukmini Bai, the madam of a brothel, in Shyam Benegal's Mandi (1983).

questions.q: Which 1975 Shyam Benegal film, his second feature exploring rural feudal exploitation after Ankur, featured Shabana Azmi in the cast?
questions.explanation: Shabana Azmi appeared in Shyam Benegal's Nishant (1975), his follow-up to Ankur exploring feudal oppression.

questions.q: Alongside her parallel-cinema work, Shabana Azmi had a major commercial hit with which 1976 action film opposite Shashi Kapoor?
questions.explanation: Fakira (1976), starring Shabana Azmi opposite Shashi Kapoor, was one of her early commercial successes.

questions.q: In which Shyam Benegal film set during the 1857 rebellion did Shabana Azmi play Firdaus opposite Shashi Kapoor's Javed Khan?
questions.explanation: Shabana Azmi played Firdaus in Shyam Benegal's Junoon (1979), set during the 1857 Indian Rebellion and produced by Shashi Kapoor.

questions.q: In Sai Paranjpye's film Sparsh, Shabana Azmi played a widow who falls in love with the blind principal of a school for the blind, a role played by which actor?
questions.explanation: In Sparsh (1980), Shabana Azmi played Kavita opposite Naseeruddin Shah as the blind principal Anirudh.

questions.q: Shabana Azmi holds the distinction of being the only actress to win three consecutive National Film Awards for Best Actress; for which trio of films did she achieve this?
questions.explanation: Shabana Azmi won three consecutive National Film Awards for Best Actress for Arth (1982), Khandhar (1984) and Paar (1984).

questions.q: What was the name of the lower-caste village woman Shabana Azmi played in her debut film Ankur, opposite Anant Nag's young landlord?
questions.explanation: In Ankur (1974), Shabana Azmi played Lakshmi, a village woman drawn into a relationship with the landlord's son played by Anant Nag.

questions.q: Shabana Azmi won a National Film Award for Best Actress for playing a woman who becomes a political crime boss in which 1999 Vinay Shukla film?
questions.explanation: Shabana Azmi won a National Film Award for Best Actress for the title role in Godmother (1999), inspired by Santokben Jadeja.

questions.q: Across her five National Film Awards for Best Actress, Shabana Azmi won for Ankur, Arth, Khandhar, Paar and which 1999 film?
questions.explanation: Shabana Azmi's fifth National Film Award for Best Actress came for Godmother (1999).
